notableEvents.label: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. grounds into a double play, second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to shortstop Anthony Volpe to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt. George Springer out at 2nd. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jazz Chisholm Jr. reaches on a fielding error by pitcher Louis Varland. Cody Bellinger to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Amed Rosario pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Amed Rosario flies out to right fielder Yohendrick Piñango in foul territory. Jazz Chisholm Jr. to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Jazz Chisholm Jr. reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Jazz Chisholm Jr. reaches on a fielding error by pitcher Louis Varland. Cody Bellinger to 3rd.
